title: Diplachne grandiglumis
taxonomy: Diplachne grandiglumis is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a type of bamboo grass, but not actually a bamboo. The genus Diplachne is a small group of grasses native to Australia and New Guinea. Diplachne grandiglumis is one of the species within this genus. This plant is also known as the 'bulbous spear grass' due to its unique growth habits.
